‘Prismatic’ = euhedral cristobalite; ‘Platy’ = platelets of cristobalite; ‘Devit. cristob.’ = cristobalite during glass devitrification; ‘Devit. quartz’ = quartz formed
(probably through phase transition from cristobalite) when the glass is totally devitrified.
*Collected by BW from deposit rather than archive.
MVO sample numbers assigned by the Montserrat Volcano Observatory.
